doc: OCR drift pairs: same doc + same page + two different extractor_version values producing different normalized_text_sha256. Consumed by the corpus-snapshot tests (workspace D) — the per-investigation snapshot must capture extractor_version per document so that re-running the investigation later with a different OCR pipeline doesn't silently change quote provenance. Every pair has at least two extractions with distinct normalized_text_sha256 values; this is asserted at fixture-build time.

pairs.what_changed: Tesseract 4.1.1 emits the U+FB01 ligature 'ﬁ' as a single code point; Tesseract 5.3.1 emits it as the two-character sequence 'fi'. Same scan, same page — but every word containing 'fi' (e.g. 'finanziario', 'fiscale', 'definitivo') produces different bytes.

extractions.normalized_text: Il rapporto ﬁnanziario ﬁscale è deﬁnitivo.
extractions.human_readable: Il rapporto ﬁnanziario ﬁscale è deﬁnitivo. (with U+FB01 ligatures)

extractions.normalized_text: Il rapporto finanziario fiscale è definitivo.
extractions.human_readable: Il rapporto finanziario fiscale è definitivo. (no ligatures)

pairs.what_changed: Tesseract 4.x leaves the U+00AD SOFT HYPHEN bytes from the original PDF in place; Tesseract 5.x silently drops them. Words split across line breaks differ in raw bytes.

An older textract path ('textract-1.4@aleph-3.10') strips non-ASCII diacritics from low-quality scans. The newer 'tesseract-5.3.1@aleph-3.18' preserves them. Same Romanian company name yields different hashes.

extractions.human_readable: S.C. ALFA Constructii S.R.L. (diacritics stripped from 'Construcții')
S.C. ALFA Construcții S.R.L. (Romanian ț preserved)

pairs.what_changed: An older OCR path misread the digit '0' as capital 'O' in the VAT-ID line. Newer extractor reads it correctly. Same underlying scan; the normalized_text_sha256 differs because the actual character is different.

extractions.human_readable: Tax ID: RO123456O8 (penultimate digit OCR'd as letter O)

pairs.what_changed: ingest-file v3.16 emits a trailing space at end-of-line; v3.18 collapses end-of-line whitespace. Page-level text differs only in trailing whitespace, but the sha256 differs.

extractions.normalized_text:
The contract amount was 120,000 EUR. 
Signed in Brussels.

The contract amount was 120,000 EUR.
Signed in Brussels.

pairs.what_changed: A two-column scanned page: aleph-3.16 reads top-to-bottom down each column (left then right); aleph-3.18 reads left-to-right across both columns line-by-line. Same words, same characters, completely different reading order.

extractions.normalized_text:
Beneficiary: ALFA SRL
IBAN: RO99 1234
Amount: 50,000 EUR
Date: 2024-03-12
extractions.human_readable: column-wise reading: beneficiary block then IBAN block then amount block then date

extractions.normalized_text:
Beneficiary: ALFA SRL  Amount: 50,000 EUR
IBAN: RO99 1234  Date: 2024-03-12
extractions.human_readable: row-wise reading: beneficiary + amount on same line, IBAN + date on next
